requirement_topic.en: Dangerous Goods Transport — UN 38.3 and Indian DG Rules
requirement_topic.zh: 危险货物运输 — UN 38.3与印度危险品法规
requirement_topic.zht: 危險貨物運輸 — UN 38.3與印度危險品法規

summary.en: Lithium batteries exported to India via air, sea, or road must satisfy the UN Manual of Tests and Criteria Part III Section 38.3 (UN 38.3) transport safety testing requirements. For air transport to India, the Directorate General of Civil Aviation (DGCA) Dangerous Goods Rules (aligned with IATA Dangerous Goods Regulations) apply. For sea transport, IMDG Code requirements apply. For road transport within India, the Motor Vehicles Act and Central Motor Vehicles Rules, together with the Manufacture, Storage and Import of Hazardous Chemical Rules 1989 (amended), govern the transport of lithium batteries as dangerous goods. India does not have a standalone domestic UN 38.3 standard but follows the UN Recommendations on the Transport of Dangerous Goods (Model Regulations) and IATA/IMDG/ADR-aligned rules through its transport regulatory bodies.
summary.zh: 经空运、海运或公路运输出口至印度的锂电池须满足《联合国关于危险货物运输的建议书 试验和标准手册》第III部分第38.3节（UN 38.3）运输安全测试要求。向印度空运时，须适用印度民用航空总局（DGCA）危险品规则（与IATA危险品规程对应）。海运须适用IMDG规程要求。在印度境内公路运输时，《机动车辆法》和《中央机动车辆规则》及《危险化学品制造、储存与进口规则1989》（修订版）共同规范锂电池作为危险品的运输。印度没有独立的国内UN 38.3标准，但通过其运输监管机构遵循《联合国危险货物运输建议书》（示范法规）及IATA/IMDG/ADR对应规则。
summary.zht: 經空運、海運或公路運輸出口至印度的鋰電池須滿足《聯合國關於危險貨物運輸的建議書 試驗和標準手冊》第III部分第38.3節（UN 38.3）運輸安全測試要求。向印度空運時，須適用印度民用航空總局（DGCA）危險品規則（與IATA危險品規程對應）。海運須適用IMDG規程要求。在印度境內公路運輸時，《機動車輛法》和《中央機動車輛規則》及《危險化學品製造、儲存與進口規則1989》（修訂版）共同規範鋰電池作為危險品的運輸。印度沒有獨立的國內UN 38.3標準，但通過其運輸監管機構遵循《聯合國危險貨物運輸建議書》（示範法規）及IATA/IMDG/ADR對應規則。

standards_or_laws: UN Manual of Tests and Criteria Part III Section 38.3 (UN 38.3) — mandatory transport test for lithium batteries (air/sea/road)
DGCA Dangerous Goods Rules — air transport of lithium batteries to/within India (aligned with IATA DGR)
IMDG Code (International Maritime Dangerous Goods Code) — sea transport
Manufacture, Storage and Import of Hazardous Chemical Rules 1989 (amended) — road transport of hazardous chemicals including lithium batteries

summary.en: China requires UN 38.3 transport testing for lithium batteries exported by air, sea, or road — the same underlying UN standard applies. Chinese BESS manufacturers exporting to India should already hold UN 38.3 test reports from an accredited test laboratory if shipping lithium batteries by air or sea. The UN 38.3 requirement is not China-specific; it is an international requirement under the UN Model Regulations, IATA DGR, IMDG Code, and ADR. Chinese export documentation under IATA DGR and IMDG for lithium batteries is generally recognised in India through the same international frameworks.
summary.zh: 中国要求通过空运、海运或公路运输出口的锂电池满足UN 38.3运输测试要求——适用相同的联合国基础标准。向印度出口的中国BESS制造商如通过空运或海运发货，应已持有认可测试实验室出具的UN 38.3测试报告。UN 38.3要求并非中国特有，而是《联合国危险货物运输建议书》示范法规、IATA DGR、IMDG规程和ADR框架下的国际性要求。中国依据IATA DGR和IMDG出具的锂电池出口文件通常通过相同国际框架在印度获得认可。
summary.zht: 中國要求通過空運、海運或公路運輸出口的鋰電池滿足UN 38.3運輸測試要求——適用相同的聯合國基礎標準。向印度出口的中國BESS製造商如通過空運或海運發貨，應已持有認可測試實驗室出具的UN 38.3測試報告。UN 38.3要求並非中國特有，而是《聯合國危險貨物運輸建議書》示範法規、IATA DGR、IMDG規程和ADR框架下的國際性要求。中國依據IATA DGR和IMDG出具的鋰電池出口文件通常通過相同國際框架在印度獲得認可。

standards_or_laws: UN 38.3 — same requirement applies to CN exports (international standard under UN Model Regulations)
GB/T 28539-2012 — 锂电池空运、水运和陆运的安全要求（Safety requirements for lithium batteries for air, water and land transport — references UN 38.3)

gap.en: UN 38.3 transport testing is an international requirement that applies equally to Chinese BESS manufacturers exporting to India. Chinese manufacturers shipping lithium batteries to India must hold valid UN 38.3 test reports. The main practical gap is ensuring test reports are current (test results are valid for the specific cell/battery design) and that Indian customs, shipping agents, and DGCA documentation requirements are met. India's DGCA DG Rules and port/customs documentation requirements for lithium batteries should be verified with a licensed DG agent before each shipment.
gap.zh: UN 38.3运输测试是国际要求，同样适用于向印度出口的中国BESS制造商。向印度发运锂电池的中国制造商须持有有效的UN 38.3测试报告。主要实践差距在于确保测试报告为最新版本（测试结果对特定电芯/电池设计有效），并满足印度海关、货运代理及DGCA锂电池文件要求。每次发货前应通过持牌危险品代理核验印度DGCA危险品规则及港口/海关文件要求。
gap.zht: UN 38.3運輸測試是國際要求，同樣適用於向印度出口的中國BESS製造商。向印度發運鋰電池的中國製造商須持有有效的UN 38.3測試報告。主要實踐差距在於確保測試報告為最新版本（測試結果對特定電芯/電池設計有效），並滿足印度海關、貨運代理及DGCA鋰電池文件要求。每次發貨前應通過持牌危險品代理核驗印度DGCA危險品規則及港口/海關文件要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (UN 38.3 required for all lithium battery air/sea/road transport to India; DGCA DG Rules mandatory for air; IMDG mandatory for sea)
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (same UN 38.3 requirement for CN exports by air/sea/road; aligns with IATA DGR and IMDG)

source.publisher: Directorate General of Civil Aviation (DGCA), Government of India

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese BESS manufacturers exporting lithium batteries to India must hold valid UN 38.3 test reports for all cells and batteries in the shipment. DGCA Dangerous Goods Rules (air) and IMDG Code (sea) documentation must be prepared by a licensed dangerous goods agent. The UN 38.3 requirement is shared with Chinese domestic export requirements; the main gap is ensuring India-specific documentation and packaging compliance for each shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 向印度出口锂电池的中国BESS制造商须为货物中的所有电芯和电池持有有效的UN 38.3测试报告。须由持牌危险品代理准备DGCA危险品规则（空运）和IMDG规程（海运）文件。UN 38.3要求与中国国内出口要求相同；主要差距在于确保每次货物的印度特定文件和包装合规性。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 向印度出口鋰電池的中國BESS製造商須為貨物中的所有電芯和電池持有有效的UN 38.3測試報告。須由持牌危險品代理準備DGCA危險品規則（空運）和IMDG規程（海運）文件。UN 38.3要求與中國國內出口要求相同；主要差距在於確保每次貨物的印度特定文件和包裝合規性。
